title: Cybernetic Upgrade applies equipped stat suite

card.rawText: During your opponent's battle play this card. Send this card to the cemetery at the end of that battle. Atk: +30. Hit: +10. AL: +12.

plan.title: Cybernetic Upgrade applies equipped stat suite
plan.summary: Equip Cybernetic Upgrade to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify the printed battle stat bonuses.

notes: Pre-place Cybernetic Upgrade on field equipped to player_1 primary creature to isolate the stat suite from battle-response timing.

steps: Treat Cybernetic Upgrade as equipped to player_1 primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect Hit and Atk output.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +30 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm battle-response timing and end-of-battle cleanup are covered by separate scenarios.
riskNotes: This fixture intentionally isolates the while-equipped stat suite.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Cybernetic Upgrade's equipped stat bonuses.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
